tables.name: tasks
tables.label: Work items
tables.description: Shared work items between you and Claude. Status + owner show who is doing what; the data/ folder mirrors this so Claude can read and update it.

tables.name: updates
tables.label: Activity
tables.description: Append-only log of status/progress updates per work item — the ongoing status and its history over time. Multiple tasks can be in progress at once, each accumulating its own updates.

tables.name: settings
tables.label: Settings
tables.description: Codev controls. The Autobuild switch lets Claude's watcher automatically run (build) items you set to status=current and assign to claude — toggle it on/off on demand.
